name: autostar
description: a* (autostar): a generalised autonomous optimisation loop — 'soft RLVR' for any artifact you can measure. Define measurable tracks, each with a verifier (deterministic / external-tool / LLM-judge / hybrid / human-gate), and it runs step→lap→round experiments with statistical confidence, mandatory reflection, a budget, persistent memory, and a live progress dashboard. By Chris von Csefalvay.
